results.title: NASA's Curiosity Rover Discovers A Strange Striped Landscape Hidden On Mars
results.description: These formations, described by the mission team as pinstriped rocks, stood out against the surrounding terrain because of their unusual layered appearance. The rover reached this area after traveling across a region containing different types of sedimentary structures. Scientists believe these layers may record environmental changes that occurred when ancient water activity shaped parts of Mars. The discovery gives researchers another opportunity to investigate how the planet transformed from a world that once hosted lakes and flowing water into the dry environment observed today.
